text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
32 
MDCD_LT_TOTAL_SPEND 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Payment Amount — Long-Term Care 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicaid payment amount from all long-term care (LT) claims for the 
beneficiary during the year. Note that this dollar amount may be an undercount if the beneficiary had 
managed care claims. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Long-Term Care Claims File (derived) 
VALUES: 
$ 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this
